uplink.description: Status report - door/window closed, normal battery (3.0 V)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic frame derived from the upstream status-report example by setting OnOff (byte 4) to 0 (magnet present = closed). Wire decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3, OnOff 0); contactState mapping authored here (0 -> closed).

uplink.description: Status report - door/window open, normal battery (3.0 V)
uplink._note: Upstream status-report example (TTN), OnOff (byte 4) = 1 (open). Wire decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3, OnOff 1); contactState mapping authored here (1 -> open).

uplink.description: Status report - door/window open, low battery (2.3 V)
uplink._note: Upstream status-report example (TTN), byte 3 = 0x97 (high bit = low-battery flag, 0x17 = 23 -> 2.3 V). Wire decode confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt '2.3(low battery)', OnOff 1); battery is normalized to volts and the flag is surfaced as the extra lowBattery.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame (reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream startup version report example. reportType byte 2 = 0x00 -> device-info frame, no measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported (not a measurement)
uplink._note: Upstream ConfigReportRsp example on fPort 7; config responses carry no measurement.
